instruction: The computer desktop icon is missing a gray watermark square. Add one back in the top-left (rect x=8, y=8, 14x14, fill #9ca3af, opacity 0.4).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/computer-desktop.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 17.25v1.007a3 3 0 0 1-.879 2.122L7.5 21h9l-.621-.621A3 3 0 0 1 15 18.257V17.25m6-12V15a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.25 2.25H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3 15V5.25m18 0A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 18.75 3H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3 5.25m18 0V12a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.25 2.25H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3 12V5.25"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/computer-desktop.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9 17.25v1.007a3 3 0 0 1-.879 2.122L7.5 21h9l-.621-.621A3 3 0 0 1 15 18.257V17.25m6-12V15a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.25 2.25H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3 15V5.25m18 0A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 18.75 3H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3 5.25m18 0V12a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.25 2.25H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3 12V5.25"/></g>
  <rect id="watermark" fill="#9ca3af" opacity="0.4" x="8" y="8" width="14" height="14" />
</svg>
